text.title: Accessibility Annotation Pattern Library Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces.

example.note: library_version not semver; archetypes <8; archetype not in enum; missing name_pattern, states, keyboard_map, focus_behaviour.

list.item: An `archetypes` item without keyboard_map or focus_behaviour.
An archetype value outside the 8-enum (custom archetypes go into a separate `extensions` array, not `archetypes`).
A `states` array with fewer than 1 entry.
